untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires manual identification of: (1) trend line construction from price data, (2) lead-in height measurement, (3) bump height calculation (at least 2x lead-in), (4) warning and sell line placement parallel to trend line. These geometric/multi-step pattern components cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The pattern requires visual chart analysis and custom geometric calculations not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex geometric reversal pattern requiring manual trend line identification, height ratio calculations, and parallel line constructions. While the signal direction is SHORT (based on reversal intent after bump confirmation), the specific entry trigger (price touching the sell line at 2x lead-in height above trend) cannot be codified without custom pattern recognition. A simplified proxy using moving average crossovers is provided but does not capture the true BARR mechanics described by Bulkowski.
